judge_reason: Description A describes a different page layout with specific handwritten numbers '597' and '1194' in different corners, while Description B quotes a substantial block of typed text about a UFO sighting and cites completely different handwritten numbers '292' and '119'.
original_image_tags: Scanned document page. The page is dark, almost black, with white typed text centered near the top. The words "RESTRICTED" appear as faint, large watermark-style stamps—one at the top header and one in the center of the page. There are two hole-punch marks on the left margin and two white circular marks (possibly hole-punch reinforcements or scanner artifacts) at the bottom edge. In the bottom right corner, a small handwritten annotation in white reads "1194". In the top left corner, a faint handwritten number "597" is visible.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A dark scanned document page with the word “RESTRICTED” stamped at the top and faintly in the center, a typed paragraph at upper left describing a “disc” with an intense green color, three punched binder holes along the left edge, two white punch marks near the bottom, and a small handwritten number near the lower right.*
